description: Create a technical cross-section detail drawing of an agricultural irrigation well in LibreCAD using mm units (conceptual scale 1mm=1ft). Center the well on X=0 with the ground surface at Y=0. The drawing must include the following layers and elements: a brown GROUND layer with a horizontal line from (-100, 0) to (100, 0); a red CASING layer representing an 8-inch casing with vertical lines at X=-4 and X=4 from Y=0 down to Y=-150, capped at the bottom; a green SCREEN layer representing a 6-inch screen with vertical lines at X=-3 and X=3 from Y=-120 down to Y=-150 including tick marks for perforations; a yellow GRAVEL layer with boundary lines at X=-10 and X=10 from Y=-100 down to Y=-150, closed at the top and bottom; a cyan or blue WATER layer showing a static water level line at Y=-40 and a pumping water level line at Y=-80; a magenta PUMP layer with a rectangle centered at (0, -100) from (-3, -95) to (3, -105); a gray SEAL layer showing grout seal zone lines at X=-8 and X=8 from Y=0 down to Y=-25; a white DIMENSIONS layer with vertical linear dimensions showing depths for Seal (25'), Static Level (40'), Gravel Top (100'), and Total Depth (150'); and a white TEXT layer featuring the title 'IRRIGATION WELL DETAIL' and labels for 'GROUND SURFACE', 'STATIC WATER LEVEL', 'PUMPING WATER LEVEL', 'CASING', 'SCREEN', 'GRAVEL PACK', 'BENTONITE SEAL', and 'SUBMERSIBLE PUMP'. Save the completed drawing to /home/ga/Documents/LibreCAD/water_well_section.dxf.
